headline: Hoto's 25-bit electric screwdriver is 40 percent off during Prime Day
summary: Hoto's 3.6V Electric Screwdriver Kit Pro is currently on a significant Prime Day sale. It's discounted by 40%, priced at $28.49. This tool is ideal for home repairs and moving tasks.

headline: The Oura Ring 4 is as low as $226 for Prime Day
summary: The Oura Ring 4 is heavily discounted for Prime Day, available for as low as $226. This last-gen smart ring offers a great bargain despite the Oura Ring 5's recent launch. It's a smart purchase for those seeking a cheaper alternative.

headline: Sony's AI Camera Assistant is exactly as bad as it looks
summary: Sony promoted the Xperia 1 VIII with poor photo samples from its new AI Camera Assistant. Initial reviews confirm the AI Camera Assistant performs poorly. The feature fails to deliver on its promise.

headline: My go-to Kindle is back at its best price yet for Prime Day
summary: Amazon's Prime Day sale offers steep discounts on Kindle e-readers. The latest Kindle Paperwhite (16GB, with ads) is $124.99, saving $35. This is the best price seen for this popular model.

headline: The 10 Best Soccer Game Covers
summary: This article ranks the top 10 best soccer game covers. It features iconic players who appeared on FIFA and PES boxes. Discover which cover stars made the list.

headline: Shaolin Soccer Spinoff Kung Fu Soccer From Stephen Chow Heads for North American Theaters
summary: Stephen Chow's 'Kung Fu Soccer' is confirmed for a North American theatrical release. This film is a spinoff of the 2001 cult classic 'Shaolin Soccer'. The release comes 25 years after the original movie.

headline: Loads of PS5 Games Are Heavily Discounted for Prime Day 2026 — Here's Our Top Picks in the Sale
summary: Many PS5 games are on deep discount for Prime Day 2026. Top picks include titles like Resident Evil Requiem and Clair Obscur: Expedition 33. This sale is a great opportunity for gamers to expand their library.

headline: Mars Attacks! 30th Anniversary 4K Blu-ray and Digital Release Announced
summary: Tim Burton's 'Mars Attacks!' is getting a 4K Blu-ray and digital release. This special release celebrates the film's 30th anniversary. Fans can enjoy the cult classic in stunning 4K.

headline: Can you keep your kids off school or refuse to work during a heatwave?
summary: The article clarifies legal rights during a heatwave regarding school and work. It addresses parental rights to keep children home from school. It also explains employee rights concerning working conditions in extreme heat.

headline: Peter Murrell jailed for more than five years for embezzling SNP funds
summary: Peter Murrell, former SNP chief executive, has been sentenced to over five years in prison. He admitted to embezzling more than £400,000 from the party. The embezzlement occurred over a 12-year period.

headline: Campaigners consider appeal after Gatwick bids fail
summary: Environmental campaigners are considering an appeal following a High Court ruling. The court backed Gatwick Airport's expansion plans. Campaigners had raised significant climate change concerns.

headline: UN commission of inquiry says Israel committing genocide in Gaza by deliberately targeting children
summary: A UN commission of inquiry report accuses Israel of committing genocide in Gaza. The report specifically cites the deliberate targeting of children. Israel rejects the findings, calling it a 'libellous sham'.
